mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_goal(user_id, goal_type, goal_value, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{goalType}, #{goalValue}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_goal SET goal_type = #{goalType}, goal_value = #{goalValue}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_goal WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
